events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario is clear: unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers in it, work in progress. This is a critical violation of OSHA 1926 Subpart P. Trenches 5 ft or deeper require protective systems (sloping, shoring, shielding) unless excavated in stable rock. Workers must be protected from cave-ins.

Decision: fail
Risk: critical
Component conditions: non-compliant (no protective system installed)
Findings: unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers inside, no cave-in protection
Actions: stop work, evacuate trench, install engineered protective system (trench box/shoring/sloping) per Subpart P before re-entry
References: OSHA 1926 Subpart P (1926.652 - protective systems, 1926.651 - general requirements)

Let me write the JSON.

Work must be halted immediately and personnel removed until compliant protection is in place.",

  ]
